title: Change Log
description: A record of notable site updates and content changes.

sections.title: Current Version
items: Added static site pages for About, Contact, Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Change Log.
Added static React rendering for page content during the build.
Kept the original game mounted at the root URL.

sections.title: Future Updates
paragraphs: Use this page to document gameplay updates, content changes, policy revisions, or layout improvements.
